BENZ MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF HER MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 28, 2012 AT 4:00 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion To Mediate In Lieu Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JENNIFER BENZ' (Unopposed) Motion To Mediate In Lieu Of Arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion To Mediate In Lieu Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Continued To Dec-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF JENNIFER BENZ'S Motion And Unopposed Motion To Mediate In Lieu Of Arbitration is Continued to December 6, 2012 to give Ms. Benz the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Ms. Benz must deliver courtesy copies of her moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than November 28, 2012 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR # 11312 = (302/MJM)
